So this lesson is an overview of the open cart sequence. The offer changes in some way. In other words, they've got a great deal right now. I mean, if you think about it in retail, it's a sale. When there's a sale, there's a beginning of the sale and the end of the sale, the same thing with your launch. So my very technical term is something bad has to happen if people don't act by the end of the launch.
